case_title: PERSOLVE LEGAL GROUP, LLP VS. STEVEN HUGGINS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: INTEREST IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 67295613) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE LEGAL GROUP, LLP

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE LEGAL GROUP, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUGGINS, STEVEN AN INDIVIDUAL $5,579.15 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $522.75 INTEREST, $292.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,054.40, SEE SCANNED DOC
